statement.description: Develops, documents, and disseminates access control policy and procedures.
Reviews and updates the current access control policy and procedures.

description.p: This control addresses the establishment of policy and procedures for the effective implementation of selected security controls.

statement.description: The organization manages information system accounts.

description.p: Account management includes the identification of account types.

statement.description: The organization employs automated mechanisms to support the management of information system accounts.

description.p: Automated mechanisms can include automated notifications.

control-enhancement.title: REMOVAL OF TEMPORARY AND EMERGENCY ACCOUNTS

statement.description: The information system automatically removes or disables temporary and emergency accounts.
After a defined time period for each type of account.

description.p: Temporary and emergency accounts are accounts intended for short-term use.

statement.description: The information system automatically disables inactive accounts.
